# grok: Greet [example.go:19]

## signature
func (g *Greeter) Greet(name string) string

## body
func (g *Greeter) Greet(name string) string {
	parts := []string{g.prefix, name}
	return strings.Join(parts, ", ")
}
  [14-16]   body bracket line, must stay bare
